summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Zomoto Tasks restaurant management system. Backend APIs working excellently (98.1% success rate). Frontend has critical modal interaction bug preventing navigation after opening create task modal.

minor_bugs.issue: Staff status transition validation too strict - prevents valid COMPLETED status update
minor_bugs.impact: Staff cannot complete tasks in some scenarios

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay blocks navigation after opening - dialog overlay intercepts all clicks preventing user from navigating to other pages

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete full task creation flow due to modal overlay blocking navigation

passed_tests: Login flow for all 3 roles (Owner, Manager, Staff)
Dashboard stats display for all roles
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix modal overlay issue in CreateTaskModal component. The dialog overlay is intercepting all clicks after modal opens, preventing navigation. This blocks the complete task creation workflow and user navigation. Also review staff task status transition logic to allow proper COMPLETED status updates.
